bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=industrials-analyst Items: 2 · Forecasts emitted: 22 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-17 · [research_task] 测算碳市场扩围对工业设备订单传导

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=测算碳市场扩围对工业设备订单传导 (led by industrials-analyst)

测算钢铁、水泥、铝冶炼核查完成后，此次扩围带来的强制碳合规成本，是否已体现为实质性节能设备订单。参考 section 4 协同需求中 industrials-analyst 的 follow_up。

  • Outcome: research discussion "测算碳市场扩围对工业设备订单传导" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 压力测试 既有研究记录的煤炭对冲腿，得三点：(1) 底层盈利地板真实——2026 长协675元/吨基准+月度≥80%/季全年≥90%履约+签约≥核定产量75%，叠加神华类龙头长协占比约80%、自产煤成本约179元/吨，印证 th_p_57d8e7c9；(2) 煤价上行并非威胁，反而抬升浮动长协价与现货收益，任务命题部分倒置；截至2026-07-15现货约804元/吨、电厂存煤约2亿吨约34天、季节性尖峰未兑现；(3) 决定性脆弱点是相关性状态：既有研究记录认定1.90%突破诱因是理财赎回+美联储外流（资金冲击而非再通胀），此时高股息煤炭是类债券拥… | → 1 foreca…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: OMO

2026-07-17 · [coverage_followup] Address coverage gap in 工业机械产业链 (Industrial Machinery)

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=Address coverage gap in 工业机械产业链 (Industrial Machinery) (led by industrials-analyst)

The 工业机械产业链 has a very low activation rate of 3.4% and requires coverage improvement. See §6.1.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Address coverage gap in 工业机械产业链 (Industrial Machinery)" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-07-14，本报告对40-45红利/30-35长债/10-15现金/5-15政策机械Barbell做红线压力测试。结论是有条件支持：橙区足够，但若全A两融跌破RMB 2.80tn且同时出现权益强平、长债收益率上行和高股息周期股股息陷阱，静态配置最大回撤可达14-18单位。红线触发后必须切至30-35红利低波、35-40久期受限国债、20-25现金、0-5政策机械，并禁止摊平。 | → 21 forecast(s) on 600031.SH,000425.SZ,603298.SH,002353.S…

  • Forecasts: 21 (0 positions); tickers: 600031.SH, 000425.SZ, 603298.SH, 002353.SZ, 002747.SZ, 601100.SH
